text:
is a weapon that appears in episode 21 of Shinkansen Henkei Robo Shinkalion Z.

Profile

The shape is similar to the Spear of Longinus.

History

It is the weapon used by Shinkalion Z 500 μSky TYPE EVA, it is summoned by Shinji and used with the https://web.archive.org/web/20210916164456/https://www.shinkalion.com/news/5958/ to paralyze the Oni EVA in mid jump as it pierces the torso when launched, finally destroying it.
